summary: Iteration 194: Tested critical missing_required_fields fix. All 13 backend tests passed. The fix correctly: (1) Downgrades missing_required_fields from BLOCKING to WARNING when vendor IS resolved, (2) Checks vendor from multiple sources (vendor_canonical, bc_vendor_number, unified_vendor_match, vendor_resolution), (3) Checks invoice_number from external_document_no, (4) Checks amount from normalized_fields. BOL doc types correctly only require vendor (not invoice_number/amount).
critical_code_review_comments: Lines 157-190 in document_readiness_service.py: Correctly broadened vendor_present check to include vendor_canonical, bc_vendor_number, vendor_resolution.vendor_no, and unified_vendor_match.bc_vendor_no
Lines 168-174: Correctly broadened invoice_present check to include normalized_fields.invoice_number, normalized_fields.reference_number, and external_document_no
Lines 177-181: Correctly broadened amount check to include normalized_fields for amount, invoice_amount, total_amount
Lines 184-190: Correctly relaxed requirements for non-invoice doc types (BOL, shipping) - only vendor required
Lines 299-307: Correctly downgraded missing_required_fields from blocking to warning when vendor IS resolved
Lines 59-62 in ap_auto_post_service.py: Correctly broadened field lookup for invoice_no (+ external_document_no), amount (+ nf.total_amount), vendor_raw (+ vendor_canonical)
seed_data_creation: None - used mock documents for direct function testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 194 verified the missing_required_fields fix. Key findings: (1) evaluate_readiness correctly returns ready_auto_draft for AP_Invoice with bc_vendor_number='TUMALOC' but missing invoice_number/amount in extracted_fields - missing_required_fields is WARNING not BLOCKING. (2) Documents with NO vendor anywhere correctly get blocked. (3) BOL doc_type with vendor but no amount/inv# correctly gets ready_auto_draft. (4) check_ap_ready_to_post correctly finds vendor from vendor_canonical when ef.vendor is empty. (5) check_ap_ready_to_post correctly finds invoice_no from external_document_no. (6) API endpoints /api/readiness/metrics, /api/readiness/automation-rate, and POST /api/readiness/reevaluate-all all work correctly.

evaluate_readiness_scenarios: AP_Invoice with bc_vendor_number but missing fields → ready_auto_draft with WARNING - PASS
Document with NO vendor anywhere → blocked - PASS
BOL doc_type with vendor but no amount/inv# → ready_auto_draft - PASS
Vendor resolved via vendor_canonical only → vendor_resolved=True - PASS
Vendor resolved via unified_vendor_match → ready_auto_draft - PASS
check_ap_ready_to_post_scenarios: vendor_canonical set but ef.vendor empty → NOT fail on 'Missing vendor name' - PASS
external_document_no set → NOT fail on 'Missing invoice number' - PASS
normalized_fields.total_amount set → NOT fail on 'Missing amount' - PASS
warning_vs_blocking_behavior: missing_required_fields is WARNING when vendor resolved - PASS
missing_required_fields is BLOCKING when vendor not resolved - PASS

data_verification.key_fix_verified: When vendor IS resolved (bc_vendor_number exists) but other fields are missing, the doc gets 'ready_auto_draft' status instead of 'blocked'. missing_required_fields appears in warning_reasons, not blocking_reasons.
